## Checklist

- [ ] Content reflects the current wording and examples from fsd.how, paraphrased rather than copied.
- [ ] SKILL.md body stays within 500 lines.
- [ ] Each reference file stays within 200–500 lines.
- [ ] SKILL.md plus any single reference stays within 1,000 lines combined.

- [ ] Internal links still resolve.
